cards.back: A subset of Artificial Intelligence (AI) that enables systems to learn from data without being explicitly programmed
A broad field of computer science that focuses on creating intelligent machines that can perform tasks that typically require human intelligence
A type of machine learning where the algorithm is trained on labeled data to learn the relationship between inputs and outputs
A type of machine learning where the algorithm is trained on unlabeled data to identify patterns and relationships
A phenomenon in machine learning where a model becomes too specialized to the training data and fails to generalize well to new, unseen data
